title: Arbitrary
description: Arbitrary UI icons made by me on my free time! they're fun, colorful, and different from normal vanilla!
body:
A New cute texture pack made by me, with all textures created arbitrarily! This texturepack changes the UI of the pack, (so far only hearts and the hurt particle) from time to time, i will personally update all textures and make this a fully GUI texturepack that changes all of minecrafts UI design! Im only updating them whenever i can, if you want to contribute please let me know!
![Arbitrary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91157d448d837093bd50d17f6f3fdf745962f6b1.png) ![Progress bar at 10%](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ea3b2a8b93030554d04612fc761d603ad41c047.png)
#
The Project is currently 10% done with all the UI (this is calculated based on how i feel and not really the completion)
![hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d376e7a7253465eaec6bc52a98e46d5bc7c4641d.png) # **Normal Heart:** ![Red Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5109253a9af008486aa4ba6e825a57dd21c36233.png) ![Half A Red Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/293a25f304092fb9819d2394bd6aca21fc3e9227.png) **Absorbtion Hearts:** ![Gold Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/696a2e477f9c847cde5428542083b7f9c3ecc8df.gif) ![Half A Gold Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9bee35efbcf5fd59d16576efd32972ab0c2660a.png) **Freezing Heart:** ![Cold Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2c9fa72a1d10c5d11ec4166cf4dd1381bef3e2b.png) ![Half A Cold Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36b3a0bd0492e8d68f601046defce30dfb37d218.png) **Poison Heart:** ![Poison Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b72e2c440074ccd1d51c3d9d122f1ae507dbab.png) ![Half A Poisoned Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14693f3d1780722a3cff44a186792fe310ae0cdd.png) **Wither Heart:** ![Wither Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f4e78d676e86af58c3f46cd8c8b81ceeed77731.png) ![Half A Withered Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb84891dc559924a7dca53b86a8e811d32c4ae22.png) **Attacking Particle:** ![Broken Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0abbe1a0cfa811bdcf1e42fade09e1dcd8213dd.png) # **AND MORE!**
This still doesnt have hardcore versions but later i promise. All rights goes to Junkeh License CC BY-ND 4.0 Please do not edit or redistribute the texturepack.
